name: Oat Bread, Quick
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F (200°C).
2. Spray a 9x5x3 inch loaf pan and wipe it down.
3. In a large bowl, combine all ingredients except the sesame seeds. Stir by hand until moistened.
4. Pour the batter into the prepared pan and sprinkle the loaf with sesame seeds.
5. Bake for 20 minutes at 400°F (200°C).
6. Reduce heat to 300°F (150°C) and bake for another 30 minutes.
